mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lease_agreement WHERE creator_type = #{creatorType} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM lease_agreement WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM lease_agreement WHERE source_type = #{sourceType} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM lease_agreement WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM lease_agreement WHERE auto_generated = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT creator_type, status, COUNT(*) as count, AVG(rent) as avg_rent, SUM(deposit) as total_deposit FROM lease_agreement WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY creator_type, status
